remedies.name: Adrak-Tulsi Kadha
remedies.method: Crush adrak and add all ingredients to water. Boil for 10 minutes until reduced to 1 cup. Strain, add honey, drink warm.
remedies.method_hindi: Adrak kood ke sab cheez paani mein daalo. 10 minute ubalo. Chaan lo, shahad daalo, garam piyo.

remedies.name: Haldi Doodh
remedies.method: Warm milk. Add haldi and black pepper. Stir well. Drink hot before bedtime.
remedies.method_hindi: Doodh garam karo. Haldi aur kali mirch daalo. Achhi tarah gholo. Raat ko sone se pehle piyo.

remedies.name: Minor Home Treatment
remedies.method: Boil ginger roots and drink the water

remedies.name: Minor Home Treatment
remedies.method: Drink honey in tea with lemon

remedies.name: Minor Home Treatment
remedies.method: Appy hot packs around your congested sinuses

remedies.name: Adrak-Shahad
remedies.method: Mix fresh ginger juice with raw honey. Lick slowly, do not swallow immediately. Let it coat the throat.
remedies.method_hindi: Adrak ka ras nikaal ke shahad ke saath mix karo. Thoda thoda chatko, seedha mat niglo.
remedies.indication: Dry cough, sore throat, gale ki khansi
contraindications: Honey not for children under 1 year

remedies.name: Mulethi (Licorice Root) Chew
remedies.method: Chew a small piece of mulethi stick slowly. Alternatively, boil in water and drink as tea.
remedies.method_hindi: Mulethi ki choti si dali ko dhire dhire chabao.
remedies.indication: Dry cough, hoarseness, gala baithe hone par

remedies.name: Kali Mirch-Ghee
remedies.method: Mix black pepper powder in warm ghee. Consume slowly. Best taken on empty stomach.
remedies.method_hindi: Kali mirch powder ko garam ghee mein mila ke chaat lo. Khali pet khaao.

remedies.name: Minor Home Treatment
remedies.method: Breathe in steam after a hot shower

remedies.name: Minor Home Treatment
remedies.method: Suck on Lozenges or Hard Candy to Stimulate Saliva

remedies.name: Namak Paani Gargle
remedies.method: Dissolve salt in warm water. Gargle for 30 seconds, spit out. Repeat 3-4 times.
remedies.method_hindi: Garam paani mein namak gholo. 30 second garare karo. Thuko. 3-4 baar karo.
contraindications: High blood pressure patients — use less salt

remedies.name: Haldi-Namak Gargle
remedies.method: Mix turmeric and salt in warm water. Gargle deeply for 30 seconds.
remedies.method_hindi: Garam paani mein haldi aur namak mila ke garare karo.

remedies.name: Ajwain Paani
remedies.method: Dry roast ajwain, boil in water for 5 minutes. Strain, add black salt. Drink warm.
remedies.method_hindi: Ajwain ko halka bhuuno, paani mein 5 min ubalo. Chaan ke kala namak daalke piyo.
remedies.indication: Gas, bloating, pet bhari feel, afara

remedies.name: Jeera Paani
remedies.method: Boil cumin seeds in water for 5 minutes. Strain and drink warm, preferably before meals.
remedies.method_hindi: Jeera paani mein 5 min ubalo. Chaan ke piyo, khaane se pehle best hai.

remedies.name: Saunf Post-Meal
remedies.method: Chew a teaspoon of fennel seeds slowly after every meal.
remedies.method_hindi: Khaane ke baad ek chammach saunf dhire dhire chabao.
remedies.indication: Bloating, gas, khana pachana, munh ki baadboo

remedies.name: Hing-Ajwain Water
remedies.method: Add hing and ajwain to boiling water. Boil 3 minutes. Strain and drink hot.
remedies.method_hindi: Ubalta paani mein hing aur ajwain daalo. 3 min ubalo. Piyo.
remedies.indication: Immediate gas relief, pet mein dard from gas

remedies.name: Peppermint Oil Temple Massage
remedies.method: Mix oils and massage gently on temples and forehead in circular motions. Inhale deeply.
remedies.method_hindi: Dono oil mix karo. Mathe aur kanak pe gol gol maalish karo. Gehri saansein lo.

remedies.name: Adrak Paste Forehead
remedies.method: Grind fresh ginger to a paste. Apply gently on forehead. Wash off after 15 minutes.
remedies.method_hindi: Adrak pees ke paste banao. Mathe pe lagao. 15 min baad dholo.

remedies.name: Giloy Juice
remedies.method: Boil giloy stem in water for 10 minutes. Strain and drink. Also available as giloy tablets.
remedies.method_hindi: Giloy ki dandi paani mein 10 min ubalo. Chaan ke piyo.

remedies.name: Tulsi-Giloy Kadha
remedies.method: Boil all ingredients for 15 minutes until water reduces to 1 cup. Strain, drink warm.
remedies.method_hindi: Sab kuch 2 cup paani mein 15 min ubalo. Chaan ke piyo.
remedies.indication: Viral fever, dengue fever support, immunity

remedies.name: Cold Wet Cloth on Forehead
remedies.method: Soak cloth in cold water. Wring out and place on forehead. Change every 5-10 minutes.
remedies.method_hindi: Kapda thande paani mein bhigao. Nicho ke mathe pe rakho. 5-10 min mein badlo.
contraindications: Ice-cold water not recommended — use room temp cold water

remedies.name: Adrak Saunf Mix
remedies.method: Mix all together. Lick slowly. Follow with small sips of warm water.
remedies.method_hindi: Sab mix karo. Dhire chatko. Thoda garam paani piyo.
remedies.indication: Ji machlana, ulti ka man, motion sickness

remedies.name: Nimbu Paani with Kaala Namak
remedies.method: Mix lemon juice, black salt and sugar in water. Sip slowly in small amounts.
remedies.method_hindi: Nimbu ka ras, kala namak aur cheeni paani mein gholo. Thoda thoda piyo.
remedies.indication: Nausea, dehydration from vomiting, pet kharab

remedies.name: ORS Ghar Pe
remedies.method: Dissolve salt and sugar in water. Drink 200-250 ml after every loose motion.
remedies.method_hindi: Namak aur cheeni paani mein gholo. Har dast ke baad 1 glass piyo.

remedies.name: Curd with Kela
remedies.method: Mash banana into curd and eat slowly. Best eaten at room temperature.
remedies.method_hindi: Kele ko dahi mein massal ke khao.

remedies.name: Isabgol
remedies.method: Mix isabgol in curd or water immediately and drink before it thickens.
remedies.method_hindi: Isabgol dahi ya paani mein mila ke jaldi piyo warna gaadha ho jaata hai.
contraindications: Drink plenty of water with it

remedies.name: Adrak-Jeera Chawal Paani
remedies.method: Boil rice with ginger and cumin until mushy. Drink the starchy water, eat the rice too.
remedies.method_hindi: Chawal, adrak, jeera namak ke saath 2 cup paani mein pakao. Paani piyo, chawal bhi khao.
remedies.indication: Loose motions, weak digestion, gut recovery

remedies.name: Warm Water with Nimbu-Shahad
remedies.method: Mix and drink first thing in the morning on empty stomach.
remedies.method_hindi: Subah uthke khali pet sabse pehle piyo.

remedies.name: Triphala before Bed
remedies.method: Mix triphala in warm water. Drink at bedtime.
remedies.method_hindi: Raat ko sone se pehle garam paani mein triphala mila ke piyo.

remedies.name: Kela aur Doodh
remedies.method: Eat 2 ripe bananas before bedtime, followed by a glass of warm milk.
remedies.method_hindi: Raat ko 2 pake kele khao, saath mein ek glass garam doodh piyo.

remedies.name: Sarso Tel Maalish
remedies.method: Heat mustard oil with garlic and ajwain until garlic turns golden. Cool to warm temp. Massage on painful joints for 10-15 mins.
remedies.method_hindi: Sarso tel mein lehsun aur ajwain daalo. Garlic sone jaisi ho tab tak pakao. Thanda karo. Jodo pe 15 min maalish karo.

remedies.name: Haldi-Adrak Anti-Inflammatory Milk
remedies.method: Stir all into warm milk. Drink before bed.
remedies.method_hindi: Sab garam doodh mein mila ke sone se pehle piyo.

remedies.name: Warm Sarso Tel Maalish
remedies.method: Warm mustard oil and dissolve rock salt. Massage on lower back with firm circular strokes. Wrap with a warm cloth after.
remedies.method_hindi: Sarso tel garam karo, namak gholo. Kamar pe gol maalish karo. Baad mein garam kapda bando.

remedies.name: Methi Dana Kadha
remedies.method: Soak methi overnight. Boil in the morning for 10 minutes. Strain and drink.
remedies.method_hindi: Raat ko methi bhigo do. Subah 10 min ubaal ke chaan lo piyo.

remedies.name: Neem Paste
remedies.method: Grind neem leaves to a paste with a little water. Apply to affected area. Wash after 20 minutes.
remedies.method_hindi: Neem ki pattiyan pees ke paste banao. Prabhavit jagah pe lagao. 20 min baad dholo.

remedies.name: Multani Mitti-Rose Water Pack
ingredients: Gulab jal (rose water) enough to make paste
remedies.method: Mix into a paste. Apply on face/skin. Leave until dry (15-20 min). Wash with cool water.
remedies.method_hindi: Gulab jal mein multani mitti milao. Chehra pe lagao. Sukne tak rakho. Thande paani se dholo.

remedies.name: Laung (Clove) on Tooth
remedies.method: Place a clove directly on the painful tooth and bite gently. Keep for 10-15 minutes. The eugenol in cloves is a natural anesthetic.
remedies.method_hindi: Ek laung dard wale daant pe rakh ke dhire dabao. 10-15 min rakho.
contraindications: Not a replacement for dental treatment

remedies.name: Clove Oil
remedies.method: Apply clove oil to a cotton bud. Dab directly on the aching tooth and surrounding gums.
remedies.method_hindi: Laung ka tel cotton bud pe lagao. Dard wali jagah pe lagao.
contraindications: Dilute before use — can burn if pure

remedies.name: Rose Water Eye Drops
remedies.method: Use a dropper or cotton pad. Apply 1-2 drops of pure rose water in eyes, or place soaked cotton pads on closed eyelids for 10 minutes.
remedies.method_hindi: Shudh gulab jal ki 1-2 boond aankhon mein daalo ya cotton pad aankhon pe rakho.
contraindications: Use only pure, filtered rose water

remedies.name: Palming (Cold Water)
remedies.method: Splash cold water on closed eyes. Then rub palms together, cup them over closed eyes and rest in darkness.
remedies.method_hindi: Bandh aankhon pe thanda paani maro. Haath ki hatheli aankh pe rakh ke andhere mein aaram karo.
remedies.indication: Screen fatigue, tired eyes, red eyes

remedies.name: Warm Milk with Jaiphal
remedies.method: Add a tiny pinch of nutmeg to warm milk with honey. Drink 30 minutes before bed.
remedies.method_hindi: Garam doodh mein bahut thoda jaiphal aur shahad daalo. Sone se 30 min pehle piyo.
contraindications: Do NOT use more than a pinch — nutmeg is toxic in large amounts

remedies.name: Brahmi Tel Head Massage
remedies.method: Warm oil slightly. Massage into scalp gently for 10 minutes before bedtime. Leave overnight.
remedies.method_hindi: Thoda garam brahmi tel sir mein 10 min maalish karo. Raat bhar rakho.
remedies.indication: Stress, poor sleep, anxiety, mind shant karna

remedies.name: Karela Juice
remedies.method: Blend karela, strain the juice. Drink 30 ml on empty stomach in the morning.
remedies.method_hindi: Karela ka juice nikaal ke subah khali pet piyo.

remedies.name: Methi Dana Soaked
remedies.method: Soak methi in water overnight. Eat the seeds and drink the water in the morning on an empty stomach.
remedies.method_hindi: Raat ko methi paani mein bhigao. Subah khali pet daane khao aur paani piyo.

remedies.name: Ashwagandha Milk
remedies.method: Mix ashwagandha in warm milk. Add honey. Drink at bedtime.
remedies.method_hindi: Ashwagandha powder garam doodh mein milo. Shahad daalo. Raat ko piyo.
remedies.indication: Stress, anxiety, fatigue, neend na aana

remedies.name: Warm Sesame Oil Foot Massage
remedies.method: Warm sesame oil. Massage feet thoroughly, especially the soles, for 10 minutes before bed.
remedies.method_hindi: Til tel garam karo. Sone se pehle pair, khaas ke talave ki 10 min maalish karo.
remedies.indication: Stress, insomnia, nervous system calming ('vata pacifying')

remedies.name: Amla-Brahmi Hair Mask
ingredients: Coconut oil enough to make paste
remedies.method: Mix powders with coconut oil to form paste. Apply to scalp, massage. Leave 30-45 mins, wash off.
remedies.method_hindi: Dono powder nariyal tel mein milao. Sir ki jad mein lagao, maalish karo. 45 min baad dholo.

remedies.name: Pyaaz ka Ras (Onion Juice)
remedies.method: Blend and strain onion. Apply juice to scalp with cotton. Leave 30 minutes, wash with mild shampoo.
remedies.method_hindi: Pyaaz ka ras nikalo. Cotton se sir ki jad mein lagao. 30 min baad dholo.

remedies.name: Aloevera Gel
ingredients: Fresh aloe vera gel from plant
remedies.method: Slice aloe leaf, scoop out gel. Apply directly to sunburned skin. Leave on.
remedies.method_hindi: Aloe vera ka gel seedha sunburned jaga pe lagao. Rehne do.

remedies.name: Cold Dahi (Yoghurt) Pack
remedies.method: Apply cold plain yoghurt to sunburned area. The lactic acid soothes burn. Leave 15 minutes, rinse gently.
remedies.method_hindi: Thanda sada dahi sunburn pe lagao. 15 min den ke baad thande paani se dholo.

remedies.name: Coriander (Dhaniya) Seed Water
remedies.method: Boil coriander seeds in water for 10 minutes. Cool to warm. Drink throughout the day.
remedies.method_hindi: Dhaniya beej paani mein 10 min ubalo. Thanda karo. Din mein thoda thoda piyo.
contraindications: Seek doctor for severe UTI — this is supportive only

remedies.name: Coconut Water
remedies.method: Drink 2-3 glasses of fresh coconut water daily. Acts as a natural diuretic and soother.
remedies.method_hindi: Din mein 2-3 glass nariyal paani piyo.
